price: Da erwies Allah uns eine Wohltat und bewahrte uns vor der Strafe des Glutwindes.
arabic: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيۡنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: famanna al-lahu ʿalaynā wawaqānā ʿadhāba al-samūmi
